name: Survival Island
author: Poki
description: Survival Island is an immersive idle game where your ultimate goal is to escape a deserted island! After surviving a shipwreck, you find yourself stranded on a deserted island. Explore the island’s wild terrains, gathering essential resources like food, wood, and minerals to stay alive. Fish, farm, and mine to collect what you need to build a shelter and fend off dangerous monsters that threaten your survival. Upgrade your home, craft better tools, and eventually, gather enough resources to build a ship and escape the island. Can you survive the challenges and find your way back home? How to play Survival Island? Move:Use WASD or the arrow keys Action: left click or press E Click to choose tools or use number keys Who created Survival Island? Survival Island is created by Panda Pasha Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Survival Island for free? You can play Survival Island for free on Poki. Can I play Survival Island on mobile devices and desktop? Survival Island can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
